headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录207篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究125篇, 开源项目42篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API10篇。热门标签：Agent（56篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ calesthio /OpenMontage：World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skill

▸ palmier-io /palmier-pro：macOS video editor built for AI

▸ jamiepine /voicebox：The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

▸ mukul975 /Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills：817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2

▸ heygen-com /hyperframes：Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.
text: 今日共收录207篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究125篇, 开源项目42篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API10篇。热门标签：Agent（56篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
